title: Enhanced Player List
description: Enhances Minecraft's default player list (TAB) by displaying additional player statistics.
body:
# Enhanced Player List

Enhances Minecraft's default player list (TAB) by displaying additional player statistics.

![Enhanced player list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7e95a2754ddab04d01deb8b253050e5d11da96e.webp)

## Features

Shows extended statistics for both online and offline players:
- ⏰ Total Playtime
- 💀 Death Count 
- 🏃‍♂️ Total Distance Traveled (km)
- 🦘 Jump Count
- ⚔️ Damage Dealt
- 🛡️ Damage Taken
- 📅 Last Seen (for offline players)

## Notes
- Uses the vanilla Tab key binding - remapping the player list will automatically remap this enhancement
- Works seamlessly with the vanilla player list functionality
- Reads from the standard Minecraft stats system
- Server-side stats are read from `world/stats/UUID.json`

## Installation
1. Install NeoForge for Minecraft 1.21.1
2. Drop the mod in your mods folder
3. Press Tab in-game to see the enhanced player list!

Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1 + NeoForge. Not tested with other versions.
